title: CITY OF PORTLAND WATER DISCOUNT PROGRAM - 211info
text: OUR JUST FUTURE ROCKWOOD BUILDING CITY OF PORTLAND WATER DISCOUNT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers sewer, stormwater, and water bill discount program. Households must reapply for assistance every two years. Applicants with an Accessory Dwelling Unit (ADU) on their property with one water meter that serves both the primary home and the ADU are not eligible to participate in the discount program. Water and sewer customers: -Households earning less than 60% of the median family income (MFI) may receive a discount of up to $210.35 on a 90-day bill. -Households earning less than 30% of MFI may receive a discount of up to $336.58 on a 90-day bill. -Sewer only or customers on alternative billing cycles discount amount will vary. 124 NE 181st Avenue Suite 109 Portland, OR 97230 Eligibility: City of Portland Water single-family residential accounts. The account holder must reside at the property. Customers with an outstanding balance are still eligible to apply. Household income must not exceed 60% of the state median family income (MFI) Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-11:45am and 1pm-4pm Email (503) 548-0217 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (503) 548-0217 Water Assistance Line Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call and leave a message to request to have an application sent by mail. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: -Proof of service address -Names and birthdates of all household members age 60 and older -Total gross monthly income for all household members over 18 -Proof of gross household income for last 30 days LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, Russian, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: City of Portland SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: 1 block North of 181st Station, Blue Line MAX Services: Discounted Sewer Service Discounted Water Service Other Services Offered At This Location: EMPLOYMENT - EMPLOYMENT SERVICES UTILITIES - ENERGY ASSISTANCE UTILITIES - ROCKWOOD WATER FINANCIAL ASSISTANCE PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OUR JUST FUTURE ROCKWOOD BUILDING
